title: Work permits with special instructions - Canada.ca
content:
## Work permits with special instructions
Find the work permit program for your situation and apply to work in Canada temporarily.

### Find out the type of work permit you need

## Employer-specific work permits
You'll need a job offer, and your employer may need a labour market impact assessment (LMIA).

### Check if your employer needs an LMIA

## International Experience Canada (IEC)
Special program for youth aged 18 to 35: Working Holiday, Young Professionals, International Co-op

### Travel and work in Canada as a youth
You don’t need a job offer for an open work permit. You’re only eligible in certain situations.

### Explore immigration programs
